title: Single task to live in multiple boards
excerpt: Is there plans to add functionality to have a single task live in multiple boards, without using the connecting boards feature?

posts.author: ErinMayfield (Erin Mayfield)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there plans to add functionality to have a single task live in multiple boards, without using the connecting boards feature?

posts.author: rodneyz (Rodney)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ErinMayfield , how are you? I’m not sure if that’s in the roadmap as a feature, but since we see a lot of users looking for that feature we have developed an app that does exactly that.

Try it here: Link to our App in the Marketplace

posts.author: rodneyz (Rodney)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @ErinMayfield , how’s it going? Were you able to try out our app? With SAME ITEM MULTIPLE BOARD by Formula Lookout, you can have the item “live” on more than one board.
